markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new Growth X lead and align on pre-launch content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Lead:** Katya Luscomb is the new Growth X point person for Biologica, managing client comms and editorial strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [**Launch Date:** Biologica's launch is set for **December 9th**. This is now firm, as product inventory was just released from testing.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [**Content Focus:** Prioritize perimenopause and postmenopause content to support the two key launch products.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [**Asset Change:** Growth X will no longer produce article images; Biologica has an internal resource.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)

## Topics

### Biologica's Mission & Product

  - [**Problem:** Existing women's health supplements fail on two fronts:](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
      - [**Targeting:** They don't address specific hormonal life stages (e.g., perimenopause).](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
      - [**Compliance:** They are expensive and hard to take (e.g., 9 pills/day bundles).](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [**Solution:** Biologica offers targeted nutrition in a desirable effervescent beverage format.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Form Factor:** An enjoyable, light, and bubbly drink, unlike "green sludge" powders.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Targeting:** Formulated for specific hormonal stages, unlike generic multivitamins (e.g., AG1).](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Goal:** Build a content library to establish authority and legitimacy for the launch.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)

### Content Strategy & Production

  - [**Airtable Status:** The Airtable content tracker was recently cleaned up.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
      - [**Pipeline Gap:** Only \~6 perimenopause/postmenopause articles are in the "Approved" queue.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
      - [**Action:** Brian will move more topics to "Approved" to ensure a steady pipeline for the launch.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [**Long-Tail Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Build authority and capture mid-funnel traffic without direct product mentions, avoiding regulatory scrutiny.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
      - [**Status:** Strategy is nearly aligned; production can begin soon.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [**Internal Doctor Resource:**](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
      - [**Status:** Matthew's initial leads didn't pan out. He will pursue new contacts to find a medical reviewer for Biologica.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)

### Pre-Launch Execution

  - [**Launch Date:** **December 9th**.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
      - [**Significance:** This date is now firm because product inventory was just released from testing (COA received), allowing it to move to the warehouse for fulfillment.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [**Website Preview:** Brian shared a canonical preview link for the pre-launch site.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
      - [**Status:** \~12 articles are live. A major font system update is in progress, which may affect blog layouts.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
      - [**Action:** Growth X will flag any bugs or visual issues found on the preview site.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [**Asset Handoff:**](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
      - [**Change:** Growth X will no longer produce article images.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
      - [**Action:** Growth X will notify Brian via the external channel with links to new articles as they are published.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Brian:**](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
      - [Move more perimenopause/postmenopause topics to "Approved" in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [**Growth X:**](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
      - [Provide Brian with an audit of all content statuses (needs review, reviewed, ready to publish).](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
      - [Notify Brian with links to new articles as they are published.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
      - [Flag any bugs or visual issues found on the preview site.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
      - [Pursue new leads for an internal medical reviewer.](https://fathom.video/share/_-xquUJ1H3yu_zW4A34G8xiofHC_J-Eb?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)
